# llms.txt — uppcba.com
> PCB assembly & manufacturing for global B2B. One-stop electronics manufacturing services.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://uppcba.com/): PCB assembly and manufacturing services
- [Blog](https://uppcba.com/blog): Technical guides and industry insights
- [Contact](https://uppcba.com/contact): Quote request

## Key Facts
- Services: PCB assembly (SMT/TH), PCB fabrication, component sourcing
- Certification: ISO 9001
- Industries: Consumer electronics, industrial, medical, automotive
